description: Create a 2-column technical datasheet for the 'SE-9042 Low-Power IoT Transceiver' using Apache OpenOffice Writer, incorporating specifications from /home/ga/Documents/product_specs.json. The document must feature the product title and 'Preliminary' at the top (full width), a two-column layout for the Description, Features, and Applications sections, and a table for Electrical Characteristics. Include a footer with the text 'SiliconEdge Solutions - Confidential' and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SE9042_Datasheet.odt.
